heading: Discovery as to debtor’s financial condition
label: 3015 Discovery as to debtor’s financial condition
notes: References in TextThe Federal Rules of Civil Procedure, referred to in subsec. (a), are set out in the Appendix to this title.

Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , and applicable with respect to certain actions for debts owed the United States pending in court on that effective date, see , set out as a note under .Nov. 29, 1990section 3631 of Pub. L. 101–647section 3001 of this title

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), in an action or proceeding under subchapter B or C, the United States may have discovery regarding the financial condition of the debtor in the manner in which discovery is authorized by the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure in an action on a claim for a debt.

children.heading: .—Limitation
children.label: b .—Limitation
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply with respect to an action or proceeding under subchapter B unless there is a reasonable likelihood that the debt involved exceeds $50,000.
